name: Motorsport Games Inc.
business: Motorsport Games Inc. is a racing game developer, publisher and esports ecosystem provider of official motorsport racing series, including games based on the 24 Hours of Le Mans endurance race and the FIA World Endurance Championship. It sells racing video games for personal computers through digital channels such as Steam and Genba, and also organizes esports events. Its products target a large global motorsport audience.

exposures.sentence: Motorsport Games Inc. (Motorsport) is a racing game developer, publisher and esports ecosystem provider of official motorsport racing series, including games based on the iconic 24 Hours of Le Mans endurance race (Le Mans) and the associated FIA World Endurance Championship (the WEC).

catalysts.event: Plan to organize the 2026/27 Le Mans Virtual Series
catalysts.sentence: Although we did not organize the Le Mans Virtual Series for the 2023/24, 2024/25 or 2025/26 seasons, we currently plan on organizing the 2026/27 Le Mans Virtual Series to commence this year.

tamClaims.claim: Le Mans cumulative global audience of 255 million and Formula 1 global fanbase of 827 million
tamClaims.sentence: The latest figures reported from 2024 show Le Mans, which includes the WEC, having a cumulative global audience of 255 million, while the global fanbase for Formula 1 was estimated to be 827 million in 2025.
